typo3/cms-lowlevel.name: typo3/cms-lowlevel
typo3/cms-lowlevel.description: TYPO3 CMS Lowlevel - Technical analysis of the system. This includes raw database search, checking relations, counting pages and records etc.
Enables the 'Config' and 'DB Check' modules for technical analysis of the system. This includes raw database search, checking relations, counting pages and records etc.
